name: SeACo-Paraformer-en — Contextual Biased on Gold-92
short_description: Per-clip STT predictions from FunASR SeACo-Paraformer-en with SeACo contextual biasing on all 93 gold-92 benchmark clips. Zero biasing effect; WER=122.2% — complete transcription failure.
model_description: iic/speech_seaco_paraformer_asr_nat-en-16k-common-vocab10020, Paraformer-CTC with SeACo module, FunASR Python SDK, GPU inference, SeACo contextual biasing with DOMAIN_VOCAB

files.description: Per-clip STT predictions on all 93 gold-92 benchmark clips with SeACo contextual biasing. Each line: clip_id, hypothesis, latency_seconds.
